titleEn.label: Hero Title (English)
titleEn.hint: Main heading displayed prominently on the homepage hero section. Keep it short and impactful.

subtitleEn.label: Subtitle (English)
subtitleEn.placeholder: I bring stories to life through animation and design...

subtitleAm.label: Subtitle (Amharic)
subtitleAm.placeholder: በአኒሜሽን እና ዲዛይን ታሪኮችን ህያው አደርጋለሁ...

backgroundImage.label: Background Image
backgroundImage.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add an image
backgroundImage.hint: Full-width background image for the hero section. Recommended: 1920x1080px, JPG or WebP format. Keep file size under 500KB for fast loading.

profilePhoto.label: Profile Photo
profilePhoto.placeholder: https://res.cloudinary.com/... or click Upload to add a photo
profilePhoto.hint: Your profile photo displayed in the hero section. Recommended: portrait orientation, at least 400x500px. JPG or PNG format. Leave empty to hide the photo.
